title: ACI 318-19 Concrete Column Design
description: Design of reinforced concrete columns in accordance with ACI 318-19.

D.description: Depth (D). Units: in. Depth of Section.

W.description: Width (W). Units: in. Width of wall.

diameter.description: Diameter (D). Units: in. Diameter of Section.

cover.description: Cover. Units: in. Concrete cover measured to outside of transverse reinforcement.

n_bars_circle.description: n. Symbol: N_{rows}. Number of bars.

size_bars_circle.description: n. Symbol: reinforcement. Units: #. No. size of bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

angle.description: Rotation. Symbol: \text{Angle}. Units: °. Angle to rotate the reinforcement pattern by. 0 degrees is defined to have a bar at the top of the center of the circle.

n_bars_top.description: n. Symbol: N_{rows}. Number of bars.

size_bars_top.description: n. Symbol: reinforcement. Units: in. No. size of bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

n_bars_bottom.description: n. Symbol: N_{rows}. Number of bars.

size_bars_bottom.description: n. Symbol: reinforcement. Units: in. No. size of bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

n_bars_left.description: n. Symbol: N_{rows}. Number of bars.

size_bars_left.description: n. Symbol: reinforcement. Units: #. No. size of bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

n_bars_right.description: n. Symbol: N_{rows}. Number of bars.

size_bars_right.description: n. Symbol: reinforcement. Units: #. No. size of bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

top_rows.description: No. Top Rows. Symbol: -. Number of top rows and spacing between the rows

top_row_spacing.description: Top Row Spacing Bar. Symbol: -. Units: in

btm_rows.description: No. Btm Rows. Symbol: -. Number of bottom rows and spacing between the rows

btm_row_spacing.description: Btm Row Spacing Bar. Symbol: -. Units: in

reinforcement_table.description: Reinforcement. Coordinates and size of all reinforcement to be considered.

spiral.description: Reinforcement Type. Shape of the column.

external_shear_reinforcement_size.description: External Shear Reinforcement Size. Symbol: N_{bt}. Units: #. No. size of external shear reinforcement bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

s.description: Ligature Spacing. Symbol: s. Units: in. Ligature Spacing for external reinforcement and additional ligature bars.

n_shear_bars_horizontal.description: Horizontal Ligatures. Symbol: N_{bt}. Additional horizontal ligature bars.

size_shear_bars_horizontal.description: Horizontal Shear Reinforcement Size. Units: #. No. size of horizontal shear reinforcement bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

n_shear_bars_vertical.description: Vertical Ligatures. Symbol: N_{bt}. Additional vertical ligature bars.

size_shear_bars_vertical.description: Vertical Shear Reinforcement size. Units: #. No. size of vertical shear reinforcement bars where number represents 1/8 inch.

l_u.description: lu. Symbol: l_u. Units: in. Unsupported length of column.

k_y.description: ky. Symbol: k_y. Effective length factor for compression members for buckling in Y direction.

k_z.description: kz. Symbol: k_z. Effective length factor for compression members for buckling in Z direction.

f_c.description: f'c. Symbol: f'_c. Units: psi. Concrete compression strength.

f_y.description: fy. Symbol: f_y. Units: psi. Yield strength of steel.

M_z.description: Mz. Symbol: M_z. Units: kip-ft. Factored bending moment design load (about Z).

M_y.description: My. Symbol: M_y. Units: kip-ft. Factored bending moment design load (about Y).

V_z.description: Vz. Symbol: V_z. Units: kip. Factored shear design load (in Z direction).

V_y.description: Vy. Symbol: V_y. Units: kip. Factored shear design load (in Y direction).

P_u.description: Pu. Symbol: P_u. Units: kip. Factored axial design load. (+ve for compression)

bending_about_z_additional.description: Uniaxial Bending (Mz). Additional points to plot for uniaxial bending about Z.

bending_about_y_additional.description: Uniaxial Bending (My). Additional points to plot for uniaxial bending about Y.

sway_nonsway.description: Sway or Non-Sway. Structure is sway or nonsway.

second_order.description: Input Load Method. Are loads input calculated from first or second order analysis. If second order in accordance with 6.7 / 6.8 then no moment amplification required, if first order moment amplification considered based on 6.6.4 .

bracing_sidesway.description: Sidesway. Structure is braced against sidesway (external systems provide sufficient restraint to lateral loads).

transverse_loading.description: Transverse Loading. Transverse loading applied between columns.

M_1y.description: M1y. Symbol: M_{1y}. Units: kip.ft. Lesser factored end moment about Y. M2y taken as My.

M_1z.description: M1z. Symbol: M_{1z}. Units: kip.ft. Lesser factored end moment about Z. M2z taken as Mz.

P_sus.description: Psus. Symbol: P_sus. Units: kip. Maximum factored sustained axial load associated with load combination. For calculation of βdns as per 6.6.4.4.4 of standard.

check_cover.description: Check Cover. Check the cover requirements.

construction_method.description: Construction Method. Check the cover requirements.

exposure.description: Exposure. Exposure classification for the purpose of assessing cover requirements.

show_table.description: Show Reinforcement Table. Show table in concrete section image.

report_detail.description: Report Detail. Level of detail in the report. Simplified - Hide explicit tension and compression checks and only show interaction diagram in resultant direction.Normal: Show tension and compression explicit and interaction for uniaxial direction and biaxial.Detailed: shows the force in concrete and steel for key points in interaction diagram.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
